name: BetterClaw
description: Intelligent device context, event filtering, and proactive insights for BetterClaw iOS

triageModel.description: Model for per-event triage (accepts llmModel as deprecated alias)

triageApiBase.description: Optional base URL for OpenAI-compatible triage endpoint (e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1 for Ollama)

pushBudgetPerDay.description: Max events forwarded to agent per day

patternWindowDays.description: Days of event history for pattern computation

analysisHour.description: Hour (system timezone) for daily analysis run
